DataCalcInsightTemplate.expression: SELECT ssot__Account__dlm.ssot__Id__c AS AccountId__c, ssot__Account__dlm.ssot__Name__c AS AccountName__c, ssot__FinancialAccount__dlm.ssot__Id__c AS FinancialAccountId__c, ssot__FinancialHolding__dlm.ssot__FinancialHoldingClass__c AS Sector__c, COUNT(ssot__FinancialHolding__dlm.ssot__Id__c) AS HoldingCount__c, TodayMarketingEvent2__cio.MarketingEventId__c AS MarketingEventId__c, TodayMarketingEvent2__cio.RiskOppFlag__c AS RiskOppFlag__c, TodayMarketingEvent2__cio.LatestCreatedDateTime__c AS LatestNewsDate__c, TodayMarketingEvent2__cio.InteractionId__c as InteractionId__c FROM ssot__FinancialHolding__dlm JOIN ssot__FinancialAccount__dlm ON ssot__FinancialAccount__dlm.ssot__Id__c = ssot__FinancialHolding__dlm.ssot__FinancialAccountId__c JOIN ssot__Account__dlm ON ssot__Account__dlm.ssot__Number__c = ssot__FinancialAccount__dlm.accountNumber__c JOIN TodayMarketingEvent2__cio ON ssot__FinancialHolding__dlm.ssot__FinancialHoldingClass__c = TodayMarketingEvent2__cio.Sector__c GROUP BY ssot__Account__dlm.ssot__Id__c, ssot__Account__dlm.ssot__Name__c, ssot__FinancialAccount__dlm.ssot__Id__c, ssot__FinancialHolding__dlm.ssot__FinancialHoldingClass__c, TodayMarketingEvent2__cio.MarketingEventId__c, TodayMarketingEvent2__cio.RiskOppFlag__c, TodayMarketingEvent2__cio.LatestCreatedDateTime__c, TodayMarketingEvent2__cio.InteractionId__c
